info.name: Smart Assessment AI - Backend APIs
info.description: Standardized response format: all responses wrapped in {status, result}. JWT Auth, Accounts, Academics (Programs, Semesters, Courses, PLO, CLO), Assessments. CLO creation blocked for inactive courses. PLO creation blocked when all program semesters are inactive.

request.description: Admin only. Returns: users (total/admin/teacher/student), programs, semesters (total/active/inactive), courses (total/active/inactive/theory/lab), course_assignments, PLO count, CLO count.

item.name: Get All Modules for a Role (by-role)

formdata.description: CSV or Excel (.xlsx/.xls). Columns: code, name

request.description: Activates semester AND sets all linked courses to is_active=True
Deactivates semester AND sets all linked courses to is_active=False
Links courses to this semester (sets semester_ref FK). replace=true unlinks existing courses first.

formdata.description:
CSV or Excel (.xlsx/.xls). Each row = ONE course (theory and lab are SEPARATE rows with separate codes e.g. CMC111 and CMC111-L).
Columns: semester, code, name, course_type (THEORY/LAB), course_class (CORE/GER/ELECTIVE), credit_hours_theory, credit_hours_lab, program_code, pre_requisites (comma-separated codes), co_requisites (comma-separated codes)
Example theory row: 1,CMC111,Programming Fundamentals,THEORY,CORE,3,0,BSCS,,CMC111-L
Example lab row:    1,CMC111-L,Programming Fundamentals (Lab),LAB,CORE,0,1,BSCS,,

request.description: Filter PLOs for a specific program
Blocked if all program semesters are inactive
Multipart form: file (CSV/XLSX). Columns: program_code, plo_number, description
Filter CLOs for a specific course
mapped_plos = list of PLO IDs. Blocked if course is inactive or course semester is inactive.
Returns combined CLO descriptions + mapped PLOs for a course (matches Curriculum_CLO_PLO sheet)
Multipart form: file (CSV/XLSX). Columns: course_code, clo_number, description, mapped_plos (e.g. "1,2,3" or "PLO-1,PLO-2"). Skips inactive course rows.
Requires both theory and lab course. clo_ids must include CLOs from BOTH courses. Returns download_url for the PDF.
Returns the PDF as a file download (application/pdf). Works for any authenticated user.
Deletes DB record AND removes the PDF file from disk.
